title: Lane 1 travel and proof hardening
summary: Harden travel framing and reusable proof surfaces so larger beta work can be verified with less manual coordination.

execution_order.goal: Scope one travel-framing or proof-harness improvement that helps future beta chapter checks.
execution_order.why_now: The project now has reusable helpers; the next improvement should reduce future handholding.

execution_order.goal: Implement the scoped travel/proof hardening without gameplay drift.
execution_order.why_now: Better proof surfaces make the larger push safer to run in parallel.

execution_order.goal: Review the hardening pass for behavior parity and proof usefulness.
execution_order.why_now: A proof helper only helps if future agents can actually reuse it.

completion_gate: One travel or proof surface becomes easier to verify.
Gameplay, save state, route state, content, and geometry remain unchanged unless explicitly scoped.
guardrails: Do not add a new navigation HUD.
Do not change route semantics or content.
Keep proof artifacts and helpers test-friendly.
post_packet_path: If clean, leave final integration signoff parked until the other lane runways finish.
If more proof gaps appear, record them as small follow-ups.

scout_handoff_488.selected_target: Add a test-only debug snapshot helper that opens the field station via the world-map route.
scout_handoff_488.why: Station snapshot proof currently has to remember an implicit world-map precondition before the field-station menu action is available.
implementation_contract: Add an exported helper such as openFieldStationViaWorldMap(fakeWindow) in src/test/debug-snapshot-harness.ts.
Compose the existing openWorldMapFromMenu and openFieldStationFromMenu helpers instead of duplicating menu navigation.
Use the new helper in src/test/save-snapshots.test.ts for station-only snapshot assertions.
Leave explicit world-map assertions as two-step flows.
scout_handoff_488.guardrail: Test-only helper change; no runtime, route, save, station UI, travel-label, content, geometry, or game.ts change.

main_implementation_488.summary: Added openFieldStationViaWorldMap() as a reusable test-only helper and switched station-only snapshot proofs to use it while leaving world-map assertion flows explicit.
main_implementation_488.guardrail: No runtime, route, save, station UI, travel-label, content, geometry, browser artifact, or game.ts change landed.

notes: The new helper composes existing menu navigation helpers and makes the field-station world-map precondition explicit.
Station-only snapshot proofs use the wrapper, while tests with map focus, marker, replay-label, or current-location assertions remain explicit two-step flows.
No runtime, route, save, station UI, travel-label, content, geometry, browser artifact, or game.ts behavior changed.
critic_review_488.parked_next: ECO-20260428-scout-489 remains parked until ECO-20260428-critic-492, ECO-20260428-critic-495, and ECO-20260428-critic-498 are clean.
